fault_hypothesis: The code on line 84 incorrectly removes the last element from the `merged` list when it is the same as the last element of both input streams. This violates the requirement to preserve all duplicates.

constraints.intent: After the pop operation, the total number of elements should still be the sum of the lengths of the input lists.
Inside the branch that removes an element, the list length invariant must still hold.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left__1 and right__1 and merged__1[-1] == left__1[-1] == right__1[-1])

constraints.intent: The condition that incorrectly triggers the removal of a duplicate element should not be true.
The returned list must contain exactly the sum of the number of elements from the input lists.
